title: Fumo - Alternate Recipes
description: Adding alternative recipes to the Fumo mod via datapack
body:
- Currently only works on the Mcreator version of the mod, ill probably have it updated sometime in Feb.


This datapack adds simplified wool based recipes to the [Fumo Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/fumo) transforming its hardcore crafting into a more laid back experience by request.

See [The Gallery Page](https://modrinth.com/datapack/fumo-easy-recipes/gallery) for information on recipes or use [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) or [REI](https://modrinth.com/mod/rei) alternatively.
